examples: The relationship between a parent and a child is instinctual and stems from basic human nature.
During critical situations, especially when a threat is perceived, the outer core loses control and fails to regulate the impulses and instinctual responses coming from the primitive brain.
We even share some basic instinctual quantitative reasoning with distant non-mammalian relatives like birds.
It is an evolutionary thing: cats trigger our instinctual desire to nurture our young.
Beyond decision making, successful leadership across all areas becomes learned and instinctual over a period of time.
